'''Ignar Ominaz''' was a [[Swooper/Legends|swoop racer]] during the last [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He was a member of [[Team Millennium Holos]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in a terrorist attack on [[Caprioril]] during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] reign.

==Biography==
Ignar Ominaz was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] racer.<ref name="Galaxies" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Ominaz was a two-time champion who utilized an [[Ikas-Adno/Legends|Ikas-Adno]] [[JP-420]] swoop, and raced for [[Team Millennium Holos]]. Ominaz attained his twenty-seventh career victory on the [[TransGal circuit]] in the [[Tasjon swoop race|race]] in [[Tasjon]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]], completing the twenty-four lap race in fifty-one minutes and fourteen seconds with a top speed of 387 [[Kilometer/Legends|kp]][[Standard hour/Legends|h]]. His nearest opponent was [[Serji-X Arrogantus]], who trailed him by less than two points. His next planned race was the [[Stassia Classic]].<ref name="HNN" />

Some time after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]],<ref name="Date" /> Ominaz was a shadow of his former glory, and maintained a [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] site from where he sold autographs. He was present on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], at the [[Agrilat Swamp Circuit]], and had ordered a custom [[Power converter/Legends|power converter]] for his swoop. The [[Drall (planet)|Drall]] courier got lost in the [[Agrilat Region|swamps]], and Ominaz hired a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to find him and provide a safe escort. Ominaz later hired the spacer again to guide the [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] [[Dinnik Innik]], Ominaz's old rival, to the circuit to compete in a private head-to-head race. When Innik arrived, he told Ominaz that he would not be racing him, and in fact had proof that Ominaz sabotaged Innik's swoop in their last encounter and was taking the evidence to the racing commission.<ref name="Galaxies" />

Ominaz was later [[Death/Legends|killed]]<ref name="SWS" /> some time before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]<ref name="Date" /> when an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] [[Caprioril Massacre|killed]] all 20,000 attendees of a swoop race on the planet [[Caprioril]] in an effort to kill [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Amel Bakli]].<ref name="SWS" />
